title: gogo issues list
description: The living, typed list of findings emitted by review (③) and test (④) and consumed by implement (②). One file per track: review/issues.json and test/issues.json, updated in place across rounds (statuses move open -> fixed -> verified, new findings are appended). The matching review-NN.md / test-NN.md is the rendered human snapshot of one round.

slug.description: Feature slug this list belongs to (kebab-case, without the feature- prefix).

round.description: The latest round number that touched this living list (matches the highest review-NN.md / test-NN.md snapshot).

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the list was last written.

issues.description: Every finding raised across all rounds for this track; resolved ones stay (status fixed/verified/wontfix) for the audit trail.

id.description: Stable, unique id within this list (e.g. REV-001, TEST-003). Never reused; never renumbered across rounds.

description.description: What is wrong and why it matters, with a concrete pointer (file:line / behaviour).

proposed_solution.description: How implement (②) should fix it. Concrete enough to act on.

severity.description: How bad it is, per code-review-standards.md.

priority.description: How soon it must be fixed.

status.description: Lifecycle: new (just raised this round) / open (awaiting a fix) / fixed (implement applied a fix, not yet re-verified) / verified (a later review/test confirmed the fix) / wontfix (intentionally not fixed).

found_in_round.description: Round number this issue was first raised.

fixed_in_round.description: Round number implement (②) wrote a fix back. Set together with fix_summary when status becomes fixed.

fix_summary.description: What implement (②) changed to address this issue (set when status becomes fixed).

allOf.$comment: A fixed issue must record when and how it was fixed.
